channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, June 5 (game #1593)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, June 5 (game #1090)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, June 5 (game #824)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Will your iPhone get iOS 27? This is the rumored support list for Apple's next software overhaul — plus compatibility information for iPadOS 27
item.description: We highlight the iPhones and iPads expected to support iOS 27 and iPadOS 27, respectively.

item.title: Steam Machine and Steam Frame are coming 'this summer'
I used Gemini in Google Sheets to create a weekly budget that updates itself — here’s how
item.description: Learn how to use Gemini in Google Sheets to build a self-updating weekly budget tracker that automatically organizes expenses, calculates totals, and simplifies money management.

item.title: Valve says it’s ready to launch the Steam Machine this summer
item.description: Valve now says that the delayed Steam Machine PC and Steam Frame VR headset are set to launch sometime this summer. In a Thursday blog post detailing its Verified programs for both pieces of hardware, Valve concludes by saying that "We're excited for players to try your titles on the new Steam hardware once they […]

item.title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
item.description: The AI giant's co-founder explained why the company may tap the public market for capital and why tokenmaxxing pushback isn't a concern.

item.title: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
item.description: The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.

item.title: Up your summer workouts with the Soundscore Sport X10 headphones while theyre half off
item.description: The Soundcore Sport X10 workout headphones are on sale at Amazon and Best Buy for $39.99, down from the normal price of $79.99. That's a 50% discount.

item.title: Quote of the day by Sam Altman: "I cannot imagine having gone through figuring out how to raise a newborn without ChatGPT" — opening up on how reliant we are on chatbots
item.description: The OpenAI CEO recently became a parent and has been relying on a chatbot for parenting tips, as many others are increasingly doing

item.title: Cape Fear review: Apple TV's new adaptation is stylish, scary, and features Javier Bardem's best performance yet
item.description: Apple TV's adaptation of Cape Fear is seriously impressive and features an unforgettable performance from Javier Bardem.

item.title: Apple WWDC 2026 is shaping up to be a big event: Heres everything we expect to learn
item.description: Apple WWDC 2026 is shaping up to be the most interesting Apple keynote event in years. We're expecting big news on iOS 27 and Siri.

item.title: I used Gemini in Google Forms to auto-build a survey and analyze responses for me
item.description: See how Google Gemini in Google Forms can automatically create surveys, summarize responses, identify trends, and save hours of manual data analysis work.

item.title: Filtr is a new privacy tool that blocks ads in almost every iPhone and Mac app
item.description: This popular ad blocker app for iPhones, iPads, and Macs can now block ads from loading inside apps, including web browsers, thanks to a new feature in the latest Apple software.

item.title: Not to Alarm Anyone, but Flesh-Eating Screwworms Have Entered the US
item.description: The USDA this week confirmed the first known infection of the carnivorous fly larva, which feast on the flesh of living mammals, after the United States eradicated the nightmare bugs in the 1960s.

item.title: Defense tech, AI, and fundraising take center stage at StrictlyVC Los Angeles on June 18
item.description: On Thursday, June 18, at The Aerospace Corporation Campus, investors, founders, and tech leaders will gather for an evening of conversation exploring some of the most consequential shifts taking place across venture capital, defense technology, artificial intelligence, and advanced industry. Secure your spot today.

item.title: AIs like ChatGPT fall apart in classic 'Stroop' psychological test — and that could stand in the way of achieving artificial general intelligence
item.description: New research is causing quite some controversy on Reddit — but it makes some very interesting points.

item.title: Substack gives creators control of the conversation with new Reply Rules
item.description: Substack has introduced Reply Rules, which individual writers can set to set the tenor for comments on their posts.
